items.topic: 關係代名詞 who / whom / whose / which
items.rule: 先行詞是人：主格 who、受格 whom、所有格 whose（後面必接名詞）；先行詞是物：which / that。whose 是唯一「後面直接接名詞」的關代。
examples: ✓ The applicant whose resume impressed us was hired.（whose＋名詞）
✓ The clerk who serves at counter 3 is very patient.
✗ The applicant who resume…（who 後不能直接接名詞）
items.trap: 看到空格後面緊跟名詞（resume、house、idea），九成是 whose。

items.rule: 疑問句放進句子裡當受詞時，改用「疑問詞＋主詞＋動詞」的直述句語序，不倒裝、不加 do/does/did。
examples: ✓ Could you tell me where the post office is?
✗ Could you tell me where is the post office?
✓ I don't know when the parcel will arrive.
items.trap: 選項裡出現「疑問詞＋動詞＋主詞」的，直接刪掉。

items.rule: 主詞是動作的承受者時用被動：be ＋ 過去分詞。判斷法：主詞自己會不會做這個動作？包裹不會自己檢查自己 → 被動。
examples: ✓ All parcels are inspected before loading.
✓ The letter was sent via airmail.
✗ The parcel delivers tomorrow.（包裹不會自己投遞）
items.trap: 無生命主詞＋及物動詞，優先考慮被動。

items.rule: look forward to、be used to、object to 的 to 是介系詞，後接 V-ing；decide、plan、hope 後接 to V；enjoy、finish、avoid、mind 後接 V-ing。
examples: ✓ I look forward to hearing from you.
✗ I look forward to hear from you.
✓ He finished sorting the mail before noon.
items.trap: look forward to ＋ V-ing 是歷屆最愛考的陷阱，to 不是不定詞！

items.rule: because ＋ 完整子句（主詞＋動詞）；because of ＋ 名詞（片語）。同理：although ＋ 子句、despite / in spite of ＋ 名詞。
examples: ✓ The flight was delayed because of the typhoon.
✓ The flight was delayed because the typhoon hit.
✓ They finished the work in spite of the heavy rain.
items.trap: 看空格後面：有主詞＋動詞選 because / although；只有名詞選 because of / despite。

items.topic: 時間介系詞 in / on / at
items.rule: at ＋ 時刻（at 9:00）；on ＋ 特定日期或星期（on July 1, on Monday）；in ＋ 月、年、季節、較長時段（in March, in 2026, in the morning）。
examples: ✓ The regulation takes effect on March 1.
✓ The counter opens at 8:30.
✓ The new stamps will be issued in October.
items.trap: 「明確的一天」一律 on——包括 on Monday morning（有指定哪一天的早上就用 on）。

items.rule: and 並列、but 轉折、so 結果、or 選擇；however / therefore 是副詞，接兩句時前面要分號或句號，不能直接當連接詞。
examples: ✓ The office was closed, so I mailed it the next day.
✓ The fee is low; however, the delivery is slow.
✗ The fee is low, however the delivery is slow.（however 不能直接連接兩句）
items.trap: 選項有 however 時檢查標點——前面沒分號就是錯的。

items.topic: 現在完成式 vs 過去簡單式
items.rule: 過去簡單式配明確過去時間（yesterday, last week, in 2020）；現在完成式配 since / for / already / yet / ever，強調到現在為止的經驗或結果。
examples: ✓ He mailed the package yesterday.
✓ He has worked at the post office for ten years.
✗ He has mailed the package yesterday.（完成式不能配 yesterday）
items.trap: 句尾有 yesterday / last ~ / ago → 一律過去簡單式。

items.rule: 單數主詞配單數動詞。不可數名詞（information, equipment, furniture, advice, mail）永遠當單數；each / every ＋ 名詞當單數；A number of ＋ 複數動詞、The number of ＋ 單數動詞。
examples: ✓ There isn't much information on the website.
✓ Each employee has an ID card.
✓ The number of parcels is increasing.
items.trap: information / mail 不可數：不加 s、不配 many、不配 are。

items.rule: make / have / let ＋ 受詞 ＋ 原形動詞；get ＋ 受詞 ＋ to V；被動意味時用過去分詞（have the parcel delivered）。
examples: ✓ The manager had the clerk check the address again.
✓ She had her hair cut.（被剪 → 過去分詞）
✓ I'll get someone to help you.
items.trap: have 後面接原形還是過去分詞，看受詞是「做動作」還是「被動作」。

items.rule: 兩者比較用比較級＋than；三者以上用 the ＋ 最高級。more 與 -er 不能同時用；比較對象要對等。
examples: ✓ Express mail is faster than ordinary mail.
✓ This is the busiest branch in the city.
✗ more faster / most fastest（重複比較）
items.trap: 「the ＋ 比較級, the ＋ 比較級」＝越…越…（The sooner, the better.）。

items.topic: 假設語氣（與現在事實相反）
items.rule: If ＋ 主詞 ＋ 過去式（be 動詞用 were）, 主詞 ＋ would / could ＋ 原形。與過去事實相反：If ＋ had ＋ p.p., would have ＋ p.p.。
examples: ✓ If I were you, I would send it by registered mail.
✓ If he had checked the address, the letter would not have been returned.
items.trap: 看到 If I were you 不要改成 was——假設語氣一律 were。
